name: Rebecca | Chromed out Ass
description:
"Wassup, Choom? Ya Need Somethin'? See something you like?~"

Rebecca seems to have spent all her eddies on some new "Chrome", That Chrome being a cyberpunk style BBL. Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by Emboquo)

Its been a bit since I did an Embo bot I think. A lot of his newer stuff has been real messy to adapt, so I figured this one was fairly easy.

I have NO CLUE whether or not the AI will pick up on Cyberpunk's Slang. I'm not patient enough to test it myself, so let me know, I guess. I tried my best to get it in there.

I hope the example dialogues help, I'm not great at writing them really.

Full art for you Freaks.
creator: wisperrr
